appraisal_events.evidence: « Ce nom de Gilberte passa près de moi… formant… un petit nuage d’une couleur précieuse… »
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator poetically invests Gilberte’s name with aura and desirability, elevating her in his eyes as a figure surrounded by a rich, inaccessible world.

status_effects.explanation: Locally, Gilberte is enhanced by the narrator’s rapt admiration and the aura surrounding her name.
